message:
test: update integration tests for parking_lot RwLock API

Remove .expect("lock poisoned"), .unwrap(), and .read().expect()
calls from integration tests now that the underlying types use
parking_lot's non-poisoning locks:

- golden_outputs: 2 sites using inner.read().expect("lock poisoned")
  for priority lookups in run_plan() and schedule helpers
- phase0_verification: 2 identical priority lookup sites in run_plan()
  and schedule helpers
- repro_cancel_strengthening: Migrate test from std::sync::RwLock to
  parking_lot::RwLock, replace .read().unwrap() with .read() in
  budget verification assertions
- repro_race_leak: Replace .read().unwrap() with .read() in cancel
  state verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
